items.example: Did you enjoy the concert last night?
She didn't go to the concert because she was tired.
They didn't watch the football match last night.
Where did you go after school? I went to the library.
Why didn't the teacher explain the homework?
Did she invite you to her birthday party?
Why didn't she come to the party?
I didn't forget – I remembered everything.
Did you miss the bus this morning?
Did he pass his driving test?
She didn't fail the exam – she passed!
When did you decide to study English?
Did you understand the lesson yesterday?
They didn't agree with the decision.
How much did you spend on the trip?
Did your team win the match?
They didn't lose – they drew 1-1.
Why did she choose that restaurant?
He didn't reply to my message.
Who paid for the dinner?
Did he promise to come?
Did she introduce her boyfriend to her parents?
Why did they complain about the food?
What did he suggest for the weekend?
Did the gift surprise her?
